key_concepts: Extreme values (outliers) skew the mean and standard deviation, ruining standard scaling.
Robust scaling substitutes the mean and standard deviation with the median and interquartile range (IQR).
By bypassing the extremes during computation, the bulk of the data remains centered properly even heavily skewed sets.

definitions.definition: Nilai ekstrem yang posisinya berjarak sangat jauh dari kelompok utama persebaran data.
Nilai tengah data saat telah diurutkan.
Jangkauan nilai penyebaran pada batas perempat rasio dua puluh lima persen hingga tujuh puluh lima persentase observasinya.

examples: Scaling corporate income where one CEO earns 1,000x the average employee.
